name: By Rose Alone
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: For every instance of DMG dealt by the wielder, there is a [StateArg3]% chance for the wielder to gain 2% Temporary Crit. DMG. After the wielder releases Exalt, they deal Active DMG 3 times to a random enemy equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's ATK. If the current realm is {Caro}, for every {Embryo} devoured, {Embryo Fusion} increases by +[StateArg2]%.
